title: $SWAP_GOLD_PROFILES
text: $SWAP_GOLD_PROFILES Swap the normal meaning of the profile characters with the literal characters. $SWAP_GOLD_PROFILES Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description $SWAP_GOLD_PROFILES swaps the normal meaning of the profile characters (GOLD *,GOLD &, GOLD |, GOLD <, GOLD >, GOLD ?, GOLD =, GOLD !) with the corresponding literal characters (*, &, |, <, >, ?, =, !). When $SWAP_GOLD_PROFILES is present, to enter a profile that matches 0-n characters, you need to enter only * . To enter the literal character * , you then need to enter GOLD *. Note: $SWAP_GOLD_PROFILES does not affect the subfield separator character. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
